attributes.name: GRAPH_USAGE_GUIDE
attributes.description: 将本文件作为意图架构知识图谱与行动约束入口使用，而不是静态清单。阅读和行动时遵循以下规则：1. 优先把本图谱当作当前任务的第一事实来源，先通读相关元素、relationships、views、attributes、testcases，再决定是否继续读取代码、测试、脚本、文档或其它外部文件。2. 本图谱以Archimate建模语言为主，辅之其它建模语言（如UML等）；所有Archimate元素的语义都以Archimate标准定义为准，不得仅凭元素名称或自然语言习惯随意改写。3. 凡属性、description、browser_path、acceptanceCriteria或其它字段指向仓库路径、#file、#sym 或外部模型线索时，应将其视为需要按需追溯的证据入口；引用内容用于补充上下文，不得推翻图谱中已经明确写出的原则、约束、显性testcase与关系语义。4. 该图谱中若存在 `Archimate_principle`、`Archimate_constrain` 等元素，你必须优先识别并严格服从；它们是硬约束，用来限制你的推理、设计与行动边界，你不能超过这些约束。5. 遇到信息冲突时，按以下优先级处理：硬约束元素与原则 > 显性testcase及意图架构显式语义 > 元素、关系、视图、attributes中的明确描述 > 被引用文件或符号 > 当前代码现状；代码只是实现证据，不会自动覆盖意图。6. 显性testcase是意图架构验收基线。除非任务明确属于意图架构设计并要求更新基线，否则你不得擅自新增、删除、重建或改写显性testcase的目标、挂载对象、断言口径与范围；编码或修复阶段只能补齐其可执行入口、支撑性实现、支撑性测试与运行环境。7. 修改边界必须清晰：意图架构设计阶段负责更新意图元素、关系、视图与显性testcase；实现架构设计阶段负责维护实现架构；编码阶段默认修改代码、测试、脚本和文档，不得把实现偏差直接回写成意图漂移。8. 分析问题时必须沿追溯链理解上下文，不得只看单个元素名称或单段description；至少应综合相关元素、关系、视图、上下游依赖、引用文件与测试挂载点后再下结论。9. 当图谱信息不完整时，可以基于仓库证据做最小必要推断，但必须显式标记假设，且不得臆造不存在的外部接口、SLA、部署事实、组织流程或新的显性验收基线。10. 若需要新增支撑性测试、实现护栏或运行环境说明，应优先写入实现架构、代码、测试与对应文档的正确落点，而不是污染意图层。11. 最终输出必须能说明：你读取了哪些图谱证据，遵守了哪些原则或约束，哪些结论是仓库已证实事实，哪些内容只是带标记的最小假设。

elements.name: MITRE ATT&CK
elements.description: MITRE ATT&CK is a globally-accessible knowledge base of adversary tactics and techniques based on real-world observations. The ATT&CK knowledge base is used as a foundation for the development of specific threat models and methodologies in the private sector, in government, and in the cybersecurity product and service community. The integration of MITRE ATT&CK with OpenCTI allows for the ingestion of data from MITRE datasets, facilitating the pre-population of your OpenCTI instance. This includes importing information on tools, malware, campaigns, intrusion sets, attack patterns, courses of action, alongside MITRE-specific frameworks such as x-mitre-matrix, x-mitre-tactic, x-mitre-collection, x-mitre-data-source, and x-mitre-data-component. The connector supports the ingestion of data from MITRE Enterprise, MITRE Mobile, and MITRE ICS matrices.

testcases.name: MITRE ATT&CK数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证仓库已为 MITRE ATT&amp;CK 外部导入 connector 提供落地的运行时定义，并在真实 Docker 容器中完成启动覆盖。关键断言：docker-compose.yml 与 docker-compose.opensearch.yml 都存在 connector-mitre 服务，pytest 节点会直接执行 docker compose up -d connector-mitre，随后校验容器处于 running 状态，且日志至少体现 connector 已注册或成功运行，并进入 PingAlive 线程等稳定启动信号。测试环境要求：必须有可用的真实 Docker daemon、docker compose、本仓库源码和本地 Python/pytest；不允许 mock Docker、OpenCTI 或架构文件。

elements.name: NIST NVD CVE
elements.description: The NVD facilitates automated vulnerability management, security measurement, and compliance processes by providing comprehensive databases that include: • Vulnerability catalogs • Software vulnerability details • Product identifiers • Severity scoring metrics Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) provides a standardized dictionary of publicly disclosed cybersecurity vulnerabilities and exposures, serving as a universal reference system for the security community. This connector seamlessly integrates with the NVD to retrieve CVE data, transform it into STIX2 format, and automatically import it into OpenCTI on a scheduled basis, ensuring your threat intelligence platform remains current with the latest vulnerability information.”

testcases.name: NIST NVD CVE数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证仓库已补齐 NIST NVD CVE connector 的部署定义与配置入口，使架构中的漏洞情报接入组件在两个 compose 变体中都有对应运行时承载。关键断言：docker-compose.yml 与 docker-compose.opensearch.yml 都存在 connector-cve 服务，服务引用 CONNECTOR_CVE_ID、CVE_INTERVAL、CVE_API_KEY，并声明 threat-intel-connectors profile；pytest 节点会验证这些约束。测试环境要求：仅需本仓库源码、本地 Python 与 pytest 即可完成当前验收；真实容器运行依赖 NVD API key，当前不把它归类为免凭据 connector，不允许使用 mock 替代仓库文件内容检查。

elements.name: Google Threat Intelligence (GTI)
elements.description:
Google Threat Intelligence provides unparalleled visibility into threats, enabling the delivery of detailed and timely intelligence to security teams worldwide. By protecting billions of users, detecting millions of phishing attempts, and dedicating extensive resources to incident investigation, Google has a comprehensive view of the threat landscape, ensuring that critical organizations, including yours, remain secure.

The integration of Google Threat Intelligence with OpenCTI enables the ingestion of threat data from the Google Threat Intel API directly into the OpenCTI platform. The connector imports key data types such as reports, locations, sectors, malware, intrusion sets, attack patterns, vulnerabilities, and raw IOCs, providing structured intelligence in a comprehensible format within OpenCTI.

testcases.name: Google Threat Intelligence (GTI)数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证 Google Threat Intelligence (GTI) connector 已在仓库中获得可部署的运行时定义，并与架构组件名称保持一致。关键断言：两个 compose 文件都存在 connector-google-ti-feeds 服务，服务引用 CONNECTOR_GOOGLE_TI_FEEDS_ID、GOOGLE_TI_FEEDS_INTERVAL、GOOGLE_TI_FEEDS_API_KEY，并使用 google-ti-feeds 作用域和 threat-intel-connectors profile；pytest 节点能直接完成校验。测试环境要求：仅需本仓库源码、本地 Python 与 pytest；不需要真实 GTI API Key，不允许通过 mock 伪造 compose 或 .env 内容。

elements.name: CrowdStrike Falcon Intelligence
elements.description:
CrowdStrike Falcon Intelligence is an integral threat intelligence module within the Falcon platform, crafted to enhance the speed and effectiveness of threat detection, investigation, and response. It equips SOC teams to work more swiftly and intelligently, leveraging automation, enrichment, and high-fidelity data to optimize their cybersecurity operations.

The OpenCTI CrowdStrike connector facilitates the import of intelligence from the CrowdStrike Falcon platform. By utilizing the Intel APIs, this connector accesses CrowdStrikeâ€™s comprehensive intelligence, including data on threat actors, indicators, reports, and YARA rules, thus enhancing the threat intelligence capabilities within OpenCTI.

testcases.name: CrowdStrike Falcon Intelligence数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证 CrowdStrike Falcon Intelligence connector 的部署支撑已落地到工作区，并保留凭据驱动型集成所需的最小配置边界。关键断言：两个 compose 文件都存在 connector-crowdstrike 服务，服务引用 CONNECTOR_CROWDSTRIKE_ID、CROWDSTRIKE_FALCON_INTERVAL、CROWDSTRIKE_FALCON_BASE_URL、CROWDSTRIKE_FALCON_CLIENT_ID、CROWDSTRIKE_FALCON_CLIENT_SECRET，并通过 threat-intel-connectors profile 受控启用；pytest 节点可直接运行。测试环境要求：仅需本仓库源码、本地 Python 与 pytest；不要求真实 CrowdStrike 凭据，不允许使用 mock 绕过对配置文件的直接验证。

elements.name: Ransomware.live
elements.description:
Ransomware.live is a specialized threat intelligence service focused on monitoring and reporting ransomware activities and incidents. By providing real-time data on ransomware campaigns, including attack vectors and ransom demands, RansomwareLive aids organizations in understanding and defending against this pervasive threat.

Integrating Ransomware.live with OpenCTI allows for the modeling of various attacks and ransomware group claims, as well as their victims, enabling tracking and alerts. This enhances the threat intelligence platform's capabilities with timely and detailed insights into the latest ransomware threats.

testcases.name: Ransomware.live数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证 Ransomware.live connector 已在仓库的运行时配置中落地，并在真实 Docker 容器中完成启动覆盖。关键断言：pytest 节点会直接执行 docker compose up -d connector-ransomwarelive，校验容器保持 running，且日志能够体现真实连接器执行；当前上游 https://www.ransomware.live/v2/groups 返回 404 时，测试接受该已知外部接口错误，但不接受容器未启动。测试环境要求：必须有可用的真实 Docker daemon、docker compose、本仓库源码和本地 Python/pytest；不允许 mock Docker 或仓库文件。

elements.name: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV)
elements.description:
CISA KEV (Known Exploited Vulnerabilities) is a catalog maintained by the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency that lists vulnerabilities actively exploited in the wild. It serves as an authoritative resource for organizations to prioritize vulnerability remediation and enhance their security resilience.

The integration of the CISA KEV source with OpenCTI enables the ingestion of vulnerabilities known to be actively exploited. This process involves parsing out Identity, Infrastructure, and Vulnerability STIX Objects, which are then imported into OpenCTI.

testcases.name: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV)数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证 CISA KEV connector 的架构声明已经映射到仓库中的实际部署定义，并在真实 Docker 容器中完成启动覆盖。关键断言：pytest 节点会直接执行 docker compose up -d connector-cisa-known-exploited-vulnerabilities，校验容器保持 running，且日志包含 CISA Bundle Complete 与 sending bundle to queue 等真实执行痕迹。测试环境要求：必须有可用的真实 Docker daemon、docker compose、本仓库源码和本地 Python/pytest；不允许 mock Docker 或仓库配置。

elements.name: Mandiant
elements.description: The Mandiant connector imports comprehensive cyber threat intelligence from Mandiant (now part of Google Cloud) Advantage API V4 into OpenCTI. It provides access to Mandiant's threat actor profiles, malware families, campaigns, vulnerability reports, indicators of compromise (IOCs), and threat analysis reports. The connector supports incremental imports with configurable intervals for different entity types, custom TLP markings, and relationship inference for enhanced threat context.

testcases.name: Mandiant数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证 Mandiant connector 已在仓库中落地为可部署的运行时定义，并明确保留 API V4 凭据接入所需的环境变量边界。关键断言：两个 compose 文件都存在 connector-mandiant 服务，服务引用 CONNECTOR_MANDIANT_ID、MANDIANT_IMPORT_INTERVAL、MANDIANT_API_V4_KEY_ID、MANDIANT_API_V4_KEY_SECRET，并声明 mandiant scope 与 threat-intel-connectors profile；pytest 节点可直接运行。测试环境要求：仅需本仓库源码、本地 Python 与 pytest；不依赖真实 Mandiant 凭据，不允许使用 mock 替代配置文件级校验。

elements.name: ThreatFox
elements.description:
ThreatFox is a platform from abuse.ch and Spamhaus dedicated to sharing indicators of compromise (IOCs) associated with malware, with the infosec community, AV vendors and cyber threat intelligence providers

The integration of ThreatFox with OpenCTI facilitates the automatic import of IOCs into the threat intelligence platform. This integration imports data for the following OpenCTI observables/indicators: file-md5, file-sha1, file-sha256, ipv4-addr, domain-name, and url. It also incorporates the Malware entity, enhancing the platform's capability to effectively manage and respond to threats.

testcases.name: ThreatFox数据接入
testcases.description: 测试目标：验证 ThreatFox connector 已在仓库中补齐部署定义，并在真实 Docker 容器中完成启动覆盖。关键断言：pytest 节点会直接执行 docker compose up -d connector-threatfox，校验容器保持 running，且日志包含 Connector successfully run 与 Last_run stored 等真实执行痕迹。测试环境要求：必须有可用的真实 Docker daemon、docker compose、本仓库源码和本地 Python/pytest；不允许 mock Docker、architecture、compose 与 .env。

elements.name: Kaspersky Enrichment
elements.description:
The OpenCTI Kaspersky enrichment connector allows you to enrich your observables with intelligence from the Kaspersky Threat Intelligence Portal. The connector queries the Kaspersky API to retrieve contextual information and threat data associated with your indicators/observables.

At this time, the connector supports file observables enrichment with Kaspersky's threat intelligence. Support for additional observable types (IP addresses, domains, and URLs) will be added in future releases.

elements.name: VirusTotal
elements.description:
VirusTotal is a comprehensive service that aggregates data from numerous antivirus products and online scanners to analyze suspicious files and URLs for potential threats. By providing collective analysis results, VirusTotal helps security teams identify malicious content quickly and effectively, supporting more comprehensive cybersecurity efforts.

Integrating VirusTotal with OpenCTI enhances threat intelligence by providing access to the collective insights of numerous security vendors. This integration allows for the automatic import of analysis results for files and URLs, enriching the threat intelligence platform with detailed threat data. Security teams can leverage VirusTotal data to confirm, investigate, and respond to potential threats more efficiently, fortifying their overall security posture.

elements.name: OpenCTIToNeo4jMirrorSync
elements.description: 承接 OpenCTI 到 Neo4j 分析副本的同步意图；详细同步、热子图范围、新鲜度与删除对齐要求按落盘文件追溯。

testcases.name: OpenCTI 情报数据镜像至 Neo4j 完整性验证
testcases.description:
*   **测试场景（GIVEN）：**
    1.  OpenCTI 容器环境已启动。
    2.  镜像专用 Neo4j 容器已启动（监听端口需与车辆资产库隔离，例如 7687）。
    3.  同步插件/脚本（Connector）已配置 Live Stream 权限。
*   **操作步骤（WHEN）：**
    1.  在 OpenCTI 界面上手动创建一个 `IPv4-Addr` (1.2.3.4)。
    2.  创建一个 `Malware` (Mirai-Botnet)。
    3.  在两者之间建立 `Relationship` (indicates)。
*   **预期结果（THEN）：**
    1.  **节点校验：** Neo4j 中必须出现标签为 `:ipv4-addr` 且属性 `value='1.2.3.4'` 的节点。
    2.  **属性映射：** 节点的 `standard_id` (STIX ID) 必须与 OpenCTI 中一致。
    3.  **关系校验：** 执行 `MATCH (a:ipv4-addr)-[r:indicates]->(b:malware) RETURN r` 必须能查询到该关系。
*   **验收标准文件：** `OPENCTI-TEST/tests/mirror/test_neo4j_sync_integrity.py`

elements.name: AIAgentGraphInvestigation
elements.description: 目标是支持远端 AI Agent 像分析师一样进行可探索、可审计、可回放的图调查，而不是仅支持固定模板查询。

elements.name: OpenCTINeo4jReplicaReadModel
elements.description: OpenCTI 权威主源旁的只读 Neo4j 热子图副本，用于高级图查询、路径分析与调查式图探索。

elements.name: ReplicaGraphQueryBackend
elements.description: 独立后端查询服务面向远端 AI Agent 暴露图查询与受控 Cypher 执行入口，并在执行侧承担只读、预算、审计与结构化拒绝。

testcases.name: 受控 Cypher 拒绝与结构化反馈
testcases.description:
*   **测试场景（GIVEN）：**
    1.  远端 AI Agent 可以自由生成 Cypher。
    2.  后端查询服务启用了只读强制、schema 白名单、预算控制和审计日志。
*   **操作步骤（WHEN）：**
    1.  Agent 提交包含写操作、越界 schema 访问或明显超预算特征的 Cypher。
    2.  后端执行层对该请求进行策略校验并做出拒绝。
*   **预期结果（THEN）：**
    1. 查询不会在副本上被执行。
    2.  响应中返回结构化 `rejection_reason`、适用预算策略和必要的纠正线索。
    3.  审计链路中能够追踪到 Agent 输入、后端裁决和拒绝原因。

testcases.name: 副本降级不静默回退
testcases.description:
*   **测试场景（GIVEN）：**
    1.  远端 AI Agent 通过后端查询服务访问图副本。
    2.  副本出现不可达、同步故障或新鲜度超阈值情况。
*  **操作步骤（WHEN）：**
    1.  Agent 发起一条需要多跳遍历或路径分析的图查询。
    2.  后端检测到副本不可安全使用。
*   **预期结果（THEN）：**
    1.  后端返回明确的降级状态、freshness 信息或同步异常状态。
    2.  后端不会静默改走不等价的 GraphQL 翻译路径并伪装成成功结果。
    3.  Agent 能基于返回状态决定等待、缩小查询范围或终止调查。

testcases.name: Docker统一代理查询入口可用性验证
testcases.description:
*   **测试场景（GIVEN）：**
    1.  查询后端以独立 Docker 容器方式运行。
    2.  Caddy 作为统一 HTTPS 反向代理入口，把 `/graph/query` 转发到 `query-backend:8088`。
    3.  调用方通过 `https://localhost/graph/query` 访问查询后端，而不是直连容器端口。
*   **操作步骤（WHEN）：**
    1.  调用方向统一代理入口提交一条包含写操作的 Cypher。
    2.  请求经由 Caddy 转发到查询后端容器。
*   **预期结果（THEN）：**
    1.  统一代理入口可达且能够把请求转发到查询后端容器。
    2.  查询后端仍返回结构化 `rejection_reason`、`budget_policy` 与 `investigation_id`。
    3.  响应保持 `backend=neo4j-replica`，且不会因为统一代理入口而退化成 OpenCTI 或 GraphQL 路径。

elements.name: RemoteAIAgentGraphExplorer
elements.description: 远端 AI Agent 基于后端裁剪后的 schema 视图与查询反馈进行探索式图分析，不直接持有 Neo4j 访问凭证。
